query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `hwgt_initiatives` (
  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `tenant_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `hr_function` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `phase` enum('foundation','build','scale','optimise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'foundation',
  `cost_low` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `cost_high` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `cost_note` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `why_suggesting` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `what_involves_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `worth_knowing` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `connects_to_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('suggested','edited','user_added','dismissed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'suggested',
  `is_dismissed` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `dismissed_at` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `diag_dismissed_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_hwgt_initiatives_tenant` (`tenant_id`),
  INDEX `idx_hwgt_initiatives_phase` (`phase`)
);

  `why_suggesting` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `what_involves_json` json DEFAULT NULL,

  `connects_to_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('suggested','edited','user_added','dismissed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'suggested',
  `is_dismissed` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `dismissed_at` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `diag_dismissed_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_hwgt_initiatives_tenant` (`tenant_id`),
  INDEX `idx_hwgt_initiatives_phase` (`phase`)
);
